items.title_en: Vatican excommunicates hundreds of thousands of splinter sect followers
items.title_zh: 梵蒂冈将数十万分裂教派追随者逐出教会

items.title_en: House lawmakers approved a bipartisan bill to protect older adults from financial fraud. Here's what to know

items.desc_en: The Financial Exploitation Prevention Act of 2025 is aimed at preventing adults age 65 or older or those with disabilities from losing their money to fraud.

items.title_zh: 特斯拉公布第二季度汽车交付量 480,126 辆，超出预期

items.title_en: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%

items.desc_zh: 预计 6 月份非农就业人数将增加 11.5 万人，失业率将稳定在 4.3%。
